commit_scope: Add the Windows fkwu socket primitive floor by lowering socket_listen, socket_port, socket_accept, socket_connect, socket_send, socket_recv, and socket_close as direct host-OS socket tags in the Form-emitted universal walker. HTTP carriers remain compatibility layers above socket bytes; the socket host-call boundary is now proven directly on Windows with no Go, clang, LLVM, or http_get available at runtime.
evidence_refs: make prompt-gate -> pass in C:\Users\umuff\.claude-worktrees\Coherence-Network\windows-fkwu-http-api-floor before edits

form/form-stdlib/form-flatten.fk -> socket_listen/socket_port/socket_accept/socket_connect/socket_send/socket_recv/socket_close now lower to fkwu tags 120..126, with comments naming socket host calls as the primitive floor and HTTP as a higher Form layer

form/form-stdlib/hati-os-kernel-emit.fk -> universal fkwu C emitter now serializes socket tags, declares a cross-platform host socket bridge with Windows Winsock startup and POSIX socket calls, stores OS sockets behind stable Form handles, and dispatches tags 120..126 directly
form/form-stdlib/hati-os-kernel.fk -> recipe-side walker helpers and lowered dispatch mirror socket tags 120..126 against existing sibling kernel socket primitives
form/fourth-arm-bands.txt -> socket-loopback admitted as fks 111111 four-way proof

deploy_validation.notes: This change updates the local Windows host floor and CI workflow. Public deployment validation remains pending until PR checks and merge.

phase_gate.reason: Local and sub-agent validation passed; CI and deploy validation remain pending until commit, push, PR checks, and merge.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Windows fkwu now carries the same minimal socket primitive boundary as the sibling kernels: Form code can open a loopback listener, read its OS-assigned port, connect, accept, send, receive, and close through fkwu-native host socket calls. HTTP verbs are no longer treated as the primitive proof surface.
public_endpoints: local-only: Windows Form stdlib/fkwu socket primitive floor; no public HTTP endpoint changed
test_flows: Socket primitive proof: verify_windows_fkwu_socket_loopback.ps1 forces a fresh fkwu/table build, runs socket-loopback four-way, then runs the cached fkwu binary directly under a sanitized runtime PATH and verifies verdict 111111 plus socket tag counters 120..126.
Regression proof: adler32 and form-asm focused bands each validate on Go, Rust, TypeScript, and fkwu with 0 divergent.
Runtime proof: existing Windows self-JIT and standalone form-cli verifiers still run under a sanitized runtime PATH where Go, clang, and llvm-objdump are absent.
